title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and up to date
scenario: Device Home Screen fails to display device name with "i" icon for unencrypted/limited support devices, green dot with "Connected" label, device image, quick settings, battery icons, and firmware version X.Y.Z
expected: The Home screen displays: Device Name (with an "i" icon if the device is unencrypted or has limited support), a green dot with "Connected" label, device image, quick settings (if enabled), a "..." button, battery icons, and firmware version "X.Y.Z".
